title: Gigeresque Modpack
description: A modded pack based on the Gigeresque mod.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9290aafce04fe0e00365df3bd62e7b5a8b0dac6_0.webp)

The primary focus of the modpack is the inclusion of Gigersque, a mod that is based on the iconic Alien franchise. This mod introduces a wide range of new content to the game, including new creatures, weapons, and tools that players can use to explore and survive in their Minecraft world. In addition to the Gigersque mod, the modpack also includes several quality-of-life modifications that are designed to make the gameplay experience more enjoyable for players. These modifications include things like improved inventory management, better graphics, and enhanced user interfaces that make it easier to navigate through the game. One of the most notable features of the modpack is the integration of various other mods alongside Gigersque. For example, the modpack includes HWG and Ad Astra, which add new spacecraft and interstellar travel mechanics to the game. These modifications work seamlessly with Gigersque, allowing players to explore the depths of space while encountering all manner of extraterrestrial threats. In addition to the integrated mods, the modpack also includes several standalone modifications that are designed to enhance the game in other ways. One such mod is Toms Storage, which adds a variety of new storage options to the game, allowing players to more efficiently organize their items and resources. Finally, the modpack includes a ton of custom world generation that is designed to make the world feel more lived-in and realistic. Many of these custom structures are based on ruins, adding a sense of history and depth to the game world that players are sure to appreciate. Overall, this modpack is an excellent choice for players who are looking to take their Minecraft experience to the next level. With its focus on Gigersque and its many integrated and standalone modifications, it offers a wealth of new content and gameplay mechanics that are sure to keep players engaged and entertained for hours on end. State of the modpack: Early Builds This means it is still being shaped based on the player base's feedback, as this modpack is centered mainly around the Gigersque discord server. Official Server: Currently whitelisted as this pack is being worked on, but this will be updated here and in the Gigersque discord when open to the public.
